terrain.name: Ground
terrain.description: Basic terrain tile with no special effect.

terrain.name: Water Tile
terrain.description: Liquid tile that drowns most ground units and prevents attacks for massive/mech units.
special_interactions: Drowns non-flying, non-massive ground units instantly when pushed in
Massive units (all Mechs, boss Vek) survive but become Submerged and cannot attack
Flying units hover over water with no effect
Extinguishes fire on units that enter water
Freezing water turns it into an Ice Tile
If a unit with A.C.I.D. drowns/enters water, the water tile becomes an A.C.I.D. Tile
Units with Explosive Decay still explode on death when pushed into water, damaging adjacent tiles
XP for kills: specific mech that pushed gets full XP; indirect kills split XP among squad

terrain.name: Mountain Tile
terrain.description: Impassable rock formation that blocks movement and projectiles. Must be hit twice to destroy.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: First hit turns into Damaged Mountain. Second hit turns into Mountain Rubble (passable ground).
special_interactions: Blocks both movement and projectile line of fire
Flying units cannot land on mountains but can fly over them
Takes 2 hits to destroy regardless of damage amount per hit
Instant-kill attacks destroy even undamaged mountains in one hit
Pushing a unit into a mountain deals bump/collision damage to the pushed unit
Mountains can be shielded
Mountain Rubble functions as normal ground

terrain.name: Forest Tile
terrain.description: Wooded tile that catches fire when damaged.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Turns into Forest Fire tile (catches fire). The tile itself ignites, not the unit.
special_interactions: Damage to the tile itself causes it to catch fire - NOT collision/push damage to a unit standing on it
A unit standing on a forest that is simultaneously damaged and pushed off will NOT be set on fire (push resolves before ignition)
Forest Fire tile sets any unit on fire that ends its turn on it
Freezing a Forest Fire turns it back into a regular Forest tile
Units immune to fire are not affected by Forest Fire

terrain.name: Sand Tile
terrain.description: Sandy terrain that turns into smoke when hit by weapon damage.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Turns into Smoke Tile when hit by weapon damage.
special_interactions: Only weapon damage turns sand into smoke - push damage and fire damage do NOT cause smoke
If hit with a fire attack, turns into Fire Tile instead of Smoke Tile
Lightning environmental effect converts sand to smoke

terrain.name: Ice Tile
terrain.description: Frozen surface that cracks and eventually breaks into water. Must be hit twice to break.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: First hit turns into Damaged Ice Tile. Second hit turns into Water Tile.
special_interactions: Takes 2 hits to fully break regardless of damage amount
Fire effects instantly convert Ice Tile to Water Tile, skipping the damaged stage
Freezing a Damaged Ice Tile restores it to full Ice Tile
Freezing a Water Tile creates an Ice Tile
Once broken, follows all Water Tile rules for units

terrain.name: Lava Tile
terrain.description: Liquid tile that behaves like water but inflicts fire on surviving units.
special_interactions: Behaves like Water for drowning purposes - kills non-flying non-massive ground units
Surviving units (massive/mechs) are submerged AND set on fire
Flying units hover over lava safely
Falling Rock environmental effect converts lava to normal ground
Frozen Lava (unimplemented in normal gameplay) becomes safe to stand on but reverts to lava when destroyed

terrain.name: Chasm Tile
terrain.description: Bottomless pit that instantly destroys any non-flying unit displaced into it.
special_interactions: Kills ALL non-flying units including massive units and boss Vek - unlike water
Shields do NOT protect against chasm death (instant kill)
Mechs that fall into chasms cannot be revived - no disabled mech left behind
Mechs falling into chasms lose Vek Mites status
Flying units hover safely over chasms
Can be created from Cracked Tiles (Advanced Edition Cataclysm mechanic)
Seismic Activity environmental effect creates chasms
Commonly found on R.S.T. Corporation island

terrain.name: Civilian Building
terrain.description: Populated structure tied to Grid Power. Destroying it reduces Grid Power and kills civilians.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Turns into Building Rubble (ground tile). Reduces Grid Power by the number of buildings on that tile.
special_interactions: Buildings have a Grid Defense % chance to resist any damage
Multiple buildings can exist on a single tile (1, 2, or rarely 3 Grid Power per tile)
When damaged, ALL buildings on that tile are destroyed at once
Building Rubble is effectively a Ground Tile
Buildings block movement for both ground and flying units
Buildings block projectile line of fire (like mountains)
Buildings can be set on fire without taking damage
Buildings can be frozen - Frozen buildings are invincible; any damage destroys the ice but not the building
Buildings are immune to fire damage
Pushing a unit into a building deals bump damage to the pushed unit (building is not damaged by the push)
Called 'Powered Building' on R.S.T. Corporation island
Grid Defense resist mechanic uses seeded RNG - resists are predetermined and can be 'fished' via Reset Turn

terrain.name: A.C.I.D. Pool
terrain.description: Pool of acid on ground that inflicts A.C.I.D. status on the first unit that stops on it.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Inflicts A.C.I.D. status on any unit (including flying) that stops on this tile. Walking through without stopping has no effect.
special_interactions: Consumed after one use - reverts to ground after a unit is inflicted
Created when a unit with A.C.I.D. status dies on a Ground Tile
A.C.I.D. Pool replaces most terrain tiles except mission-specific ones like Conveyor Belts
Mechs cannot be deployed on A.C.I.D. Pools at mission start, even with A.C.I.D. immunity
Flying units ARE affected by A.C.I.D. Pools (unlike water/lava)
Shields block A.C.I.D. Pool effect without being consumed
Vek do not factor A.C.I.D. Pools when choosing movement paths

terrain.name: A.C.I.D. Tile
terrain.description: Liquid tile that behaves like water but inflicts A.C.I.D. on surviving units.
special_interactions: Behaves exactly like Water Tile for drowning purposes
Surviving units additionally get A.C.I.D. status
Created when a unit with A.C.I.D. enters/drowns in a Water Tile
Frozen A.C.I.D. Tile takes 2 hits to crack, then reverts to A.C.I.D. Tile
Vek can emerge from A.C.I.D. pools on some special missions

terrain.name: Fire Tile
terrain.description: Tile engulfed in flames that sets units on fire.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Sets any unit ending its turn here on fire (unless fire immune).
special_interactions: Created by fire weapons, fire attacks, or environmental effects
Different from Forest Fire in creation method but same effect on units
Freezing a Fire Tile or applying Smoke removes the fire
Fire replaces Smoke when fire is applied to a Smoke Tile
Fire Tiles can exist on top of Conveyor Belts
Enemy Vek that are not already burning will not deliberately stand on Fire Tiles

terrain.name: Smoke Tile
terrain.description: Tile filled with smoke that prevents units from attacking or repairing.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Units cannot attack or repair. Clears when unit moves out of smoke.
special_interactions: Attacking enemy units that end their turn on Smoke will have their attack cancelled
Created by damaging Sand Tiles with weapon damage, or by smoke-creating weapons
Units on fire that enter smoke have their fire extinguished
Fire attacks on Smoke Tiles replace smoke with Fire Tile
Smoke can stack with other modified tiles like A.C.I.D. Pools
Smoke does NOT prevent: explosions, Vek spawns, death-effects (like Explosive Decay from Arachnid Psion)
Camila Vera pilot grants smoke immunity to her mech
Spiderling Eggs: webbing is interrupted by smoke but hatching is not

terrain.name: Electric Smoke Tile
terrain.description: Smoke variant that also damages enemy units.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Units cannot attack or repair. Additionally, electricity damages enemy units.
special_interactions: Functions like regular smoke but also damages enemies
Created by certain weapons (e.g., Rusting Hulks squad weapons)
Smoke-immune enemies are NOT immune to electric smoke damage

terrain.name: Conveyor Belt
terrain.description: Mechanical tile that pushes any unit in the marked direction at end of turn.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Pushes any unit (including flying units) one tile in the belt's direction at the appropriate phase.
special_interactions: Flying units ARE still pushed by conveyor belts
Push direction is fixed and marked on the tile visually
Commonly found on Detritus Disposal island
Fire Tiles can exist on top of Conveyor Belts
A.C.I.D. Pools do NOT replace Conveyor Belts
Pushing into occupied tiles or walls causes bump damage as normal

terrain.name: Teleporter Pad
terrain.description: Paired pads that warp units between them. Always come in pairs.
terrain.effect_on_unit: End movement here to warp to the matching pad. If a unit occupies the other pad, the two units swap positions.
special_interactions: Units voluntarily ending movement on a teleporter are warped to the paired pad
If the destination pad is occupied, the two units swap positions
Teleporter does NOT remove Webbed status
Found in certain mission maps

terrain.name: Spawn Tile
terrain.description: Telegraphed tile where Vek will emerge next turn.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Any unit blocking this space when Vek emerge takes 1 damage but prevents the Vek from spawning.
special_interactions: Appear on the bottom portion of the map, prioritizing columns B-G and rows 1-3
Only uses corners or tiles closer to the player if no viable positions exist
Can appear on most non-liquid tiles including Forest, Fire, Cracked, A.C.I.D. Pool, Sand, Smoke
Never appear under uncollected Time Pods
Can appear on a tile where Time Pod was collected
Blocking unit takes 1 damage and prevents the Vek from emerging that turn
Force Amp passive increases damage to enemy Vek blocking spawn tiles
Stabilizers passive nullifies blocking damage to mechs
Buildings, other Vek, and any unit can block spawn tiles

terrain.name: Cracked Tile
terrain.description: Weakened ground tile that turns into a Chasm if damaged again.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Turns into a Chasm Tile, destroying any non-flying unit on it.
special_interactions: Introduced/expanded in Advanced Edition via Cataclysm mechanic
Can be created by certain weapons that crack tiles
Any damage to the cracked tile shatters it into a chasm, killing the unit standing on it
Spawn tiles can appear on cracked tiles

terrain.name: Time Pod
terrain.description: Collectible pod that rewards items. Must be protected from enemies.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Destroyed if damaged or trampled by enemy.
special_interactions: Collect with a Mech by moving onto it, or defend until Vek retreat
Rewards a Reactor Core and chance of weapon, passive, or pilot
Spawn tiles never appear under uncollected Time Pods
Destroyed if an enemy moves through or stands on it
Creates a 'Protect the Time Pod' bonus objective when it appears

terrain.name: Freeze Mine
terrain.description: Mine tile that freezes any unit that stops on it.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Any unit that stops on this space will be Frozen.
special_interactions: Shielded units remove the mine without being frozen and without losing their shield
Consumed after one use

terrain.name: Old Earth Mine
terrain.description: Explosive mine that kills any unit that stops on it.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Any unit that stops on this space triggers the mine and is killed.
special_interactions: Instant kill effect - shields do not protect
Consumed after one use

terrain.name: Super Volcano
terrain.description: Indestructible volcanic formation found in the final mission.
special_interactions: Only appears in the Volcanic Hive final mission (surface phase)
Source of environmental hazards: Lava Flow and Volcanic Projectiles
Lava Flow and Volcanic Projectiles never target tiles occupied by Power Pylons

terrain.name: Building Rubble
terrain.description: Remains of a destroyed building. Functions as normal ground.
special_interactions: Created when a Civilian Building is destroyed
Functionally identical to Ground Tile

terrain.name: Mountain Rubble
terrain.description: Remains of a destroyed mountain. Functions as normal ground.
special_interactions: Created when a Damaged Mountain is destroyed
Functionally identical to Ground Tile

terrain.name: Frozen A.C.I.D.
terrain.description: Frozen acid tile. Takes two attacks to crack, then becomes an A.C.I.D. Tile.
terrain.effect_on_unit: Safe to stand on while frozen.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Takes 2 hits to crack. When destroyed, becomes an A.C.I.D. Tile.
special_interactions: Created when A.C.I.D. Tile is frozen or when a unit with A.C.I.D. dies on an Ice Tile
Behaves like Ice Tile for damage purposes
When fully broken, reverts to dangerous A.C.I.D. Tile (liquid)

terrain.name: Frozen Building
terrain.description: A building encased in ice. Invincible while frozen.
terrain.effect_when_damaged: Any damage destroys the ice but NOT the building. Building is revealed unharmed.
special_interactions: Freezing buildings is an effective defensive strategy
The freeze acts as a one-hit shield for the building
Building remains fully intact after ice is broken

terrain.name: Grassland
terrain.description: Special tile found in terraforming missions. Functions as normal ground.
special_interactions: Appears in bonus objective missions: 'Terraform Grassland tiles into Sand'
Functionally same as Ground Tile

status_effects.name: Fire
status_effects.effect: Unit takes 1 damage at the start of every turn (during attack order processing, before enemy attacks).
applied_by: Standing on or ending turn on a Forest Fire tile
Standing on or ending turn on a Fire Tile
Emerging from a tile that is on fire
removed_by: Moving into Water (submerging extinguishes fire)
Moving into a Smoke Tile
Being Frozen (but if hit by fire while frozen, unit unfreezes AND catches fire simultaneously)
Repairing (also extinguishes fire on the tile the unit stands on)
Shield (blocks fire from being applied, but does NOT remove existing fire)
special_interactions: Fire damage occurs in Attack Order, usually first, before enemy attacks - burning 1HP units die before acting
Healing from Technician pilot ability and Blood Psion passive occurs in same timing window
Setting a unit on fire also sets the tile on fire
Fire removes Smoke from a tile
Fire immediately cracks Ice Tiles (skips damaged stage, goes straight to water)
A.C.I.D. does NOT double fire damage (fire is not weapon damage)
Buildings are immune to fire - setting fire on a building tile does NOT damage Grid Power
Enemy Vek that are not already burning will not deliberately stand on Fire Tiles
Fire can stack with A.C.I.D. on a unit simultaneously
immunity_sources: Smoldering Psion (grants fire immunity to all Vek)

status_effects.name: Frozen
status_effects.effect: Unit is completely immobile, cannot move or attack. Unit is immune to damage while frozen - any damage frees the unit instead of harming it.
status_effects.duration: Indefinite until freed by damage, repair, or specific interactions.
applied_by: Can be applied at the start of battle in certain scenarios
removed_by: Taking any damage (damage is negated, unit is freed)
Using the Repair ability (mechs only)
Fire damage (unfreezes AND catches fire simultaneously)
Moving over lava
special_interactions: Frozen units can still be pushed by weapons
Frozen flying units become grounded - can be killed by falling into chasms/water
When Vek are unfrozen, they will NOT ready an attack until their next turn (even if they had one queued)
Frozen Vek serve as barriers to block other Vek movement/positioning
Freezing a building makes it invincible - any damage breaks ice but building is unharmed
Freezing a Forest Fire tile reverts it to a regular Forest
Freezing Water creates an Ice Tile
Freezing Damaged Ice restores it to full Ice
Freezing a Fire Tile extinguishes it
Frozen units are NOT protected from instant-kill effects (Self-Destruct, chasms, environmental kills)
In the final mission, mechs frozen at end of Phase 1 are unfrozen at start of Phase 2
Casting shield on a frozen unit makes it both frozen AND shielded (resistant to 2 attacks)

status_effects.name: Energy Shield
status_effects.effect: Blocks one instance of damage completely and prevents new negative status effects. Only direct damage removes the shield.
applied_by: Auto-Shields passive (triggers on buildings after first hit)
Certain Cannon-Bot enemies and Bot Leader
Certain upgraded weapons (Spartan Shield, Grappling Hook)
removed_by: Taking direct damage from any source (shield absorbs the damage completely)
Combo damage: first hit breaks shield, second hit in same attack damages unit
special_interactions: Blocks any single attack regardless of damage amount
Blocks: Vek attacks, friendly weapons, spawn blocking damage, collision damage, Explosive Decay damage, Psion Tyrant damage
Prevents status effects without consuming shield: Fire, A.C.I.D. Pool, Freeze
Applying shield to an already-affected unit does NOT remove existing status effects
Shields do NOT prevent Fire damage on already-burning units
Shield + Frozen = resistant to 2 attacks (first breaks ice, second breaks shield or vice versa)
Freeze Mine: shielded unit removes mine without being frozen or losing shield
CANNOT block instant-kill effects: Self-Destruct, Satellite Rocket, Supply Train ramming, Chasm death, Mosquito Leader attack, Air Bombing, Lightning Strikes
AOE weapons like Electric Whip hit multi-segment units (train) twice, so shield only blocks first hit
Supply Train: shield covers whole train; attacking any part removes shield from whole train; applying to any part shields whole train
Zoltan Shield variant: same as normal shield but regenerates at the start of every turn

status_effects.name: Corroding A.C.I.D.
status_effects.effect: Weapon damage against this unit is doubled. All other damage (Push, Blocking, Fire, etc.) is unaffected. Disables Armor.
removed_by: Repairing (active repair action, NOT Technician passive or Blood Psion healing)
special_interactions: ONLY doubles weapon damage - push damage, collision damage, fire damage, spawn blocking damage are NOT doubled
Disables Armor trait entirely while A.C.I.D. is active
A.C.I.D. DOES apply to self-damage from weapons like Unstable Cannon
A.C.I.D. DOES double the bonus damage from Boosted attacker
Can stack with Fire (unit can be both on fire and corroded)
Can stack with Frozen (unit can be frozen and corroded)
Unit with A.C.I.D. that dies on Ground Tile creates an A.C.I.D. Pool
Unit with A.C.I.D. that dies on Fire Tile: A.C.I.D. Pool is created which extinguishes the fire
Unit with A.C.I.D. that enters Water: Water Tile becomes A.C.I.D. Tile
Unit with A.C.I.D. that dies on Ice Tile: tile becomes Frozen A.C.I.D.
A.C.I.D. Pool replaces most terrain except mission-specific tiles (Conveyor Belts)
Vek do NOT factor A.C.I.D. Pools when choosing movement - can be exploited by killing enemies in favorable positions
Technician ability and Blood Psion healing do NOT remove A.C.I.D.
immunity_sources: Active Shield status (prevents application without consuming shield)

status_effects.name: Smoke
status_effects.effect: Unit cannot attack or repair while in smoke.
status_effects.duration: As long as unit remains on a Smoke Tile. Clears immediately when unit moves off.
applied_by: Sand Tile hit by weapon damage (creates Smoke Tile)
removed_by: Moving the unit off the Smoke Tile
Fire attack replacing the Smoke Tile with Fire Tile
special_interactions: Enemy units that end their turn on Smoke have their queued attack cancelled
Smoke does NOT prevent: explosions, Vek spawns, death-effects (Explosive Decay)
Smoke extinguishes fire on units that enter smoke tiles
Can stack with A.C.I.D. Pools on the same tile
Cannot stack with Fire - fire replaces smoke
Camila Vera: her mech is immune to smoke (can attack and repair in smoke)
immunity_sources: Smoke-immune enemies (but they are still damaged by Electric Smoke)

status_effects.name: Webbed
status_effects.visual_indicator: Web strands connecting unit to the Spider
status_effects.effect: Unit cannot move but CAN still attack.
removed_by: Being pushed to an empty tile (even if captor also moves in same direction)
Dashing away
Captor's attack being cancelled
Captor dying
special_interactions: Webbed units CAN still attack - only movement is restricted
Teleporter and similar weapons do NOT remove Webbed status
If a webbed mech uses Teleporter/Swap, the swapped unit becomes webbed instead
Pushing a webbed unit to an empty tile frees it

status_effects.name: Boosted
status_effects.visual_indicator: Upward arrow / boost icon on unit
status_effects.effect: Unit's next action deals +1 damage or +1 healing. Affects all targets of the attack including self-damage.
status_effects.duration: Consumed on next ability use (including non-damaging abilities and repairing).
applied_by: Boost weapons and abilities (Advanced Edition mechanic)
removed_by: Using any ability (consumed on use)
Using Repair (Boosted Repair heals 2 HP instead of 1)
special_interactions: Affects ALL targets of an attack (very effective for AoE attacks)
Boosted self-damage: weapons with self-damage deal +1 to self too
A.C.I.D. doubles the Boosted bonus damage (stacks multiplicatively)
Consumed on ANY ability use including non-damaging abilities
Repairing while Boosted heals 2 points
Deployable and spawned units (Light Tank, Arachnoid) are NOT affected by Boost
Advanced Edition addition

status_effects.name: Armored
status_effects.effect: Incoming weapon damage is reduced by 1. All other damage (Push, Blocking, Fire, etc.) is unaffected.
applied_by: Innate trait on certain units: Judo Mech, Hook Mech, Armored Train, Bouncer Leader
Shell Psion (grants Armored to all Vek)
Abe Isamu pilot (grants Armored to his mech)
Psionic Receiver passive (if Shell Psion is present)
removed_by: Disabled by A.C.I.D. status (re-enabled when A.C.I.D. is removed via Repair)
special_interactions: Only reduces WEAPON damage by 1 - does not reduce push damage, collision damage, fire damage, spawn blocking, electric smoke
Multiple instances of Armored on the same unit do NOT stack (redundant)
Reduces each individual damage source by 1 (e.g., multi-hit still gets -1 per hit)
Also reduces Psion Tyrant's Hive Targeted damage
A.C.I.D. completely disables Armor

status_effects.name: Stable
status_effects.effect: Cannot be moved by any weapon effect (Push, Teleport, etc.).
applied_by: Innate trait: Burrower, Alpha Burrower, Terraformer, Disposal Unit, Detritus Contraption, Shield Generator, Hacking Station, Supply Train, Armored Train, Earth Mover
special_interactions: Stable units CANNOT be pushed into other units to cause push damage
But pushing OTHER units INTO a stable unit WILL cause bump damage to the pushed unit as normal
Teleporter/Swap cannot move stable units
Conveyors cannot move stable units

status_effects.name: Deadly Threat
status_effects.effect: The attack or environmental effect on this tile will kill any unit regardless of HP. Shields and Ice do not block.
applied_by: Environmental kill effects: Air Bombing, Lightning Strikes, Falling Rock, Tentacles, Volcanic Projectile
special_interactions: Shields do NOT block instant kill
Frozen status does NOT block instant kill
Armor does NOT reduce instant kill
The only protection is to not be on the tile (move, push, teleport away)

status_effects.name: Submerged
status_effects.effect: Unit's weapons do not work. Unit is immune to fire.
status_effects.duration: As long as unit remains in liquid tile.
applied_by: Massive/Mech unit standing in Water Tile
Massive/Mech unit standing in Lava Tile (also inflicts fire)
Massive/Mech unit standing in A.C.I.D. Tile (also inflicts A.C.I.D.)
removed_by: Moving out of the liquid tile
special_interactions: Fire immunity while submerged in water
Flying units never become submerged

status_effects.name: Not Powered
status_effects.effect: Unit is inactive and cannot move or attack, but still blocks reinforcements on its tile.
status_effects.duration: Until repaired or mission phase change.
applied_by: Mech HP reaching 0 (mech is disabled, not destroyed)
Pilot killed but mech survives in some contexts
removed_by: Repair Drop or similar healing
Mission phase transition (e.g., Volcanic Hive phase 2 restores disabled mechs)
special_interactions: Disabled mechs still physically block spawn tiles
Disabled mechs can still be pushed

status_effects.name: Vek Mites
status_effects.effect: Unit is infected with Vek Mites. Mission objective: remove all mites for reputation.
applied_by: Knock Mites off Mechs mission (all mechs start infected)
removed_by: Taking damage
Fire
A.C.I.D.
Freezing
Repairing
special_interactions: Only appears in specific Advanced Edition mission objective
Removing all three mites from all mechs grants 1 reputation
Mechs falling into chasms lose mites

structure.grid_power_per_tile: Usually 1-2 per tile, rarely 3. A tile's building count equals its Grid Power value.

damage_interaction.normal_damage: Any damage destroys ALL buildings on the tile at once, reducing Grid Power by that amount. Tile becomes Building Rubble (ground).
damage_interaction.grid_defense: Each hit has a percentage chance to be resisted based on Grid Defense stat. If resisted, no damage occurs.
damage_interaction.fire_damage: Buildings are IMMUNE to fire. Fire can be set on a building tile without damaging it.
damage_interaction.push_into_building: Pushing a unit into a building causes bump damage to the pushed unit. The building is NOT damaged by the collision.
damage_interaction.frozen_building: Any damage breaks the ice but leaves the building unharmed. Acts as a free one-hit protection.
damage_interaction.shielded_building: Shield absorbs one hit of damage. Auto-Shields passive grants shield after first hit.

variants.civilian_building: Standard building. Worth 1-3 Grid Power. Contains civilians (count varies by difficulty).
variants.powered_building: Same as Civilian Building but named differently on R.S.T. Corporation island.

mission_structures.coal_plant: Bonus objective building. Worth 1 Grid Power.
mission_structures.emergency_batteries: Bonus objective building. Worth 1 Grid Power.
mission_structures.old_earth_bar: Bonus objective civilian facility. Worth 1 Grid Power. Rewards reputation.
mission_structures.clinic: Bonus objective civilian facility. Worth 1 Grid Power. Rewards reputation.
mission_structures.defense_lab: Bonus objective tech facility. Worth 1 Grid Power. Rewards Reactor Core.
mission_structures.robotics_lab: Bonus objective tech facility. Worth 1 Grid Power. Rewards Reactor Core.
mission_structures.corporate_tower: Boss mission objective building. Worth 1 Grid Power.
mission_structures.decoy_building: Self-destructs, damaging nearby tiles. Does NOT damage neighboring buildings.
mission_structures.power_pylon: Found in Volcanic Hive final mission. Provides Grid Power. Not populated (no civilian casualties). Deployed by R.S.T. Corporation CEO.

grid_power.game_over_condition: Grid Power reaches 0. The timeline is lost. Player may bring one surviving pilot to try again in a different timeline.
grid_power.persistence: Grid Power changes persist between islands within a run.
gaining_power: Some missions grant Grid Power as a bonus objective reward
After finishing a Corporate Island, spend 1 Reputation for 1 Grid Power
Perfect Island reward: can choose +2 Grid Power
Grid Charger weapon: restores 1 Grid Power when used successfully
losing_power: Civilian Building destroyed: lose Grid Power equal to number of buildings on that tile (1-3)
Power Pylon destroyed in Volcanic Hive: lose Grid Power
grid_power.unfair_note: On Unfair difficulty, all grid health earned is doubled.

grid_defense.description: Percentage chance that a building will resist damage when hit.
grid_defense.overpower_bonus: Each Grid Power gained when already at max: +2% for first 5 points, then +1% per point, up to +25% total.
grid_defense.pilot_bonus: +3% per pilot with '+3 Grid DEF' skill. Max 3 pilots = +9%.
grid_defense.maximum_total: 49% (15% base + 25% overpower + 9% pilot). 34% on Unfair (0% base + 25% + 9%).
grid_defense.seeded_rng: Resist outcomes are predetermined by the game's seeded RNG. Reset Turn does NOT change the outcome. This allows 'fishing for resists' strategy where players test a resist on one building, and if it succeeds, know a different building hit will also resist.
grid_defense.resist_fishing_explanation: If a building resists during the player turn, resetting will reproduce the same resist. The source of damage and specific building hit do not affect the outcome. Players can sacrifice a building test to check if the next resist in the sequence is favorable.

weapon_damage.description: Direct damage from weapons (player or enemy). Reduced by Armor (-1). Doubled by A.C.I.D. Increased by Boost (+1).

push_collision_damage.description: Damage dealt when a pushed unit collides with an obstacle (wall, mountain, building, another unit). Always 1 damage to the pushed unit. If pushed into another unit, both take 1 damage.
details: Pushing into map edge: 1 damage to pushed unit
Pushing into mountain: 1 damage to pushed unit (mountain takes no damage)
Pushing into building: 1 damage to pushed unit (building takes no damage from collision)
Pushing into another unit: 1 damage to BOTH units
Pushing into water/lava/chasm: unit enters the tile (drowns/falls/burns instead of bump)
Stable units: cannot be pushed, but pushing units INTO them causes normal bump damage

fire_damage.description: 1 damage per turn from Fire status effect. Applied during attack order phase.

spawn_blocking_damage.description: 1 damage taken by a unit blocking a Vek spawn point.
spawn_blocking_damage.note: Can be nullified by Stabilizers passive. Force Amp passive increases damage to enemy Vek blocking spawns.

explosive_decay_damage.description: 1 damage to all adjacent tiles when a unit with Explosive Decay dies.
explosive_decay_damage.note: Ignores Armor. Triggered even when unit drowns in water.

electric_smoke_damage.description: Damage to enemy units standing in Electric Smoke tiles.
electric_smoke_damage.note: Even smoke-immune enemies take electric smoke damage.

self_damage.description: Some weapons deal damage to the user. Affected by A.C.I.D. and Boost.

instant_kill.description: Certain effects kill regardless of HP. Cannot be blocked by Shield, Frozen, or Armor.
sources: Environmental: Air Bombing, Lightning Strike, Falling Rock, Tentacles, Volcanic Projectile

push_pull_mechanics.description: Many weapons push or pull units in cardinal directions.
push_rules: Pushed unit moves 1 tile in the specified direction
If destination is empty ground: unit moves there, no damage
If destination is occupied (unit, building, mountain): pushed unit stops, both take 1 bump damage (building/mountain take no damage but pushed unit does)
If destination is map edge: pushed unit stops at edge, takes 1 bump damage
If destination is water: non-flying non-massive units drown; massive units submerge
If destination is lava: same as water but surviving units catch fire
If destination is chasm: non-flying units die (including massive)
If destination is A.C.I.D. Tile: same as water but surviving units get A.C.I.D.
Stable units cannot be pushed at all
Push happens before other effects resolve (e.g., forest ignition happens after push)
pull_rules: Same as push but in opposite direction (toward the puller)
push_pull_mechanics.combo_damage: When an attack deals weapon damage AND pushes, both can occur. Shield absorbs the first damage source, second damage lands.

attack_types.beam: Target all tiles in a line until hitting a Building, Mountain, or Super Volcano. Can deal varying damage or apply effects.
attack_types.projectile: Shoot in a straight line, hitting the nearest non-empty tile.
attack_types.artillery: Arc over obstacles to hit any tile in a line. Cannot target immediately adjacent tiles. Enemy artillery usually limited to 5-tile range.
attack_types.dash: Move in a straight line toward target, usually pushing the target.
attack_types.fly_over: Move unit over targets, applying effects to units under trajectory.
attack_types.free_aim: Target any tile on the battlefield. Usually limited to support structures and limited-use weapons.

additional_attack_effects: Push or pull target(s) in cardinal direction
Apply Fire, Freeze, A.C.I.D., Smoke, or Shield
Flip target's attack direction (single-direction attacks only)
KO effects: additional effect triggered if primary target is killed (Advanced Edition)

turn_structure.overview: Each mission lasts 5 turns (some exceptions: train missions last 4 turns). Each turn has distinct phases.

mission_length.volcanic_hive_surface: 5 turns (ends with seismic activity sending mechs underground)

1_player_phase.description: Player moves mechs and uses weapons. Vek attacks are telegraphed on the board.
details: At the start of each player turn, Vek telegraph their intended attacks (show target tiles)
Player can move each mech once and use one weapon per mech
A mech cannot move after using a weapon (move first, then attack)
Player can use Reset Turn once per battle to undo all actions in the current turn
Player can end turn early at any time

2_attack_order_resolution.description: After player ends their turn, effects resolve in a specific Attack Order. Viewable by hovering 'Attack Order' or holding Alt.
order: 1. Fire damage (burning units take 1 damage - units at 1HP die before they can act)
3. Environmental effects (varies: air strikes, high tide, lava flow, lightning, seismic activity, volcanic projectiles, falling rocks, tentacles, ice storms, conveyor belts)
4. Enemy Vek attacks execute (in displayed order)
5. Vek spawn (emerge from spawn tiles - blocked by any unit on the tile)
notes: The exact order is displayed in-game via the Attack Order indicator
Environmental effects and enemy attacks are interleaved in a specific order each turn
Conveyor belts push during this phase
Units killed by fire before their attack turn do not get to attack

3_new_vek_movement.description: Newly emerged Vek and surviving Vek reposition and telegraph their next attacks.
details: All living Vek move to new positions
Each Vek telegraphs its intended attack for the next turn
Vek target buildings, mechs, or objectives based on AI priorities
Vek that were unfrozen this turn do NOT telegraph an attack (they skip their first turn after unfreezing)

spawn_mechanics.telegraphing: Spawn tiles appear at the END of the enemy turn, showing where Vek will emerge NEXT turn.
spawn_mechanics.emergence: Vek emerge during the Attack Order resolution phase (after enemy attacks).

blocking.description: Any unit on a spawn tile prevents the Vek from emerging.
blocking.damage: The blocking unit takes 1 damage (unless mitigated by Stabilizers passive).
blocking.delayed_spawn: Blocked Vek will attempt to spawn again next turn on the same or different tile.
blocking.note: On the final turn, blocking is permanent since there is no next turn for the Vek to try again.

spawn_tile_placement.priority_area: Bottom of map: columns B-G, rows 1-3
spawn_tile_placement.fallback: Corners and tiles closer to player if no viable positions exist
restrictions: Can appear on most non-liquid tiles
Can appear on Forest, Fire, Cracked, A.C.I.D. Pool, Sand, Smoke tiles
Cannot appear under uncollected Time Pods
Can appear on tiles where Time Pod was already collected

spawn_mechanics.vek_count_scaling: Number of Vek that spawn depends on difficulty, mission objective count (3-objective missions have more spawns), and how far into the run the player is.

reset_turn.effect: Rewinds all actions in the current player turn. All units return to starting positions.
limitations: Does NOT change seeded RNG outcomes (Grid Defense resists are predetermined)
Cannot undo events from previous turns
Achievements earned before reset are kept

special_pilots.isaac_jones: Temporal Reset: grants a second reset per battle
special_pilots.adam: Chosen One: grants shield to his mech and +2 move after resetting

easy.alpha_vek: No alpha Vek outside of 3-objective missions on first and second islands
easy.vek_spawns: Fewer Vek spawn across all missions
easy.rare_vek: Islands cannot have more than one type of rare Vek
easy.kill_objective_threshold: Kill at least 5 enemies (vs 7 on Normal+)

normal.alpha_vek: Alpha Vek appear outside of 3-objective missions starting from the second island
normal.rare_vek: Fourth island has two types of rare Vek

hard.alpha_vek: Alpha Vek appear more often, can be encountered on any mission from the first island
hard.rare_vek: Third and fourth islands have two types of rare Vek
hard.volcanic_hive: A Boss Vek appears on the first phase of the Volcanic Hive

unfair.volcanic_hive: Two bosses in each phase during 3 or 4 island playthroughs
unfair.fourth_island_bosses: A Vek Leader appears in every regular mission on the 4th island, replacing one of the possible enemies that has a Boss variant (except Spider Leader and island Psion). HQ mission on 4th island has two bosses.

new_content.squads: 5 new squads with 15 new squad achievements
new_content.vek: 7 new Vek, 3 new Psions, 10 new boss battles
new_content.missions: 12 new mission types, 3 new bonus mission goals
new_content.pilots: 4 new pilots, 10 new random pilot abilities
new_content.music: 2 new music tracks by Ben Prunty
new_content.languages: 7 new languages (Arabic, Thai, Swedish, Korean, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Latin American Spanish)

unfair_difficulty.description: Even more challenging difficulty mode. See difficulty section for full details.

ko_effects.description: Certain weapons trigger an additional effect if the primary target is killed by the attack.
ko_effects.examples: Various Advanced Edition weapons have KO triggers

cracking_mechanic.description: Certain weapons cause the ground to crack, creating Cracked Tiles. If a Cracked Tile is damaged again, it shatters into a Chasm, destroying the tile and anything standing on it.
cracking_mechanic.creates: Cracked Tile -> Chasm Tile on second hit

boost_status_effect.description: New status effect that increases the next attack's damage by 1. Highly effective for AoE attacks.

new_vek_types.leaders: 10 new boss variants for the new Vek types
new_vek_types.note: Advanced Edition Vek do NOT spawn in the Volcanic Hive final mission (only classic Vek). Exception: on Unfair 3-4 island playthroughs, one AE boss variant can appear.

new_mission_objectives: Kill 5 or fewer enemies (4 Easy, 5 Normal/Hard, 6 Unfair)
Knock Mites off Mechs (all mechs start with Vek Mites; remove via damage, fire, A.C.I.D., freeze, repair)
Destroy 2 Vek Egg Sacks (stationary enemies with 1 HP)
new_mechanics.content_toggles: All new content (enemies, pilot skills, etc.) except balance changes can be toggled off for base-game experience.
balance_changes: Weapon reactor usage reduced for most weapons
Store reputation cost to purchase weapons increased by 1
Store options limited in first 2 islands

psion_abomination.description: Enhanced Psion boss found in certain late-game encounters.
psion_abomination.effect: Enhances ALL Vek: +1 HP, regeneration, and Explosive Decay on death.

psion_types_summary.blast_psion: All Vek explode on death (Explosive Decay), dealing 1 damage to adjacent tiles
psion_types_summary.blood_psion: Heals all Vek 1 HP per turn (Regeneration)
psion_types_summary.shell_psion: Grants Armored to all Vek (-1 weapon damage)
psion_types_summary.soldier_psion: Grants +1 max HP to all Vek
psion_types_summary.psion_tyrant: Deals 1 damage to all friendly (player) units every turn. Found only in Volcanic Hive.
psion_types_summary.smoldering_psion: Grants Fire immunity to all Vek (Advanced Edition)
psion_types_summary.arachnid_psion: Grants Explosive Decay to all Vek on death (Advanced Edition)

environmental_effects.description: Environmental effects are telegraphed hazards that occur during the Attack Order phase. They appear on specific tiles and resolve during the enemy turn.

effects.name: Air Strike
effects.effect: Bombs dropped on tile, instantly killing any unit.

effects.name: Falling Rock
effects.effect: Rock falls on tile, killing any unit. Converts Lava tiles to normal ground.

effects.name: High Tide
effects.effect: Tile becomes Water at start of enemy turn. Removes emerging.

effects.name: Ice Storm
effects.effect: Freezes anything present on the tile.

effects.name: Lava Flow
effects.effect: Tile turns into Lava. Removes emerging.

effects.name: Lightning Strike
effects.effect: Kills any unit on the tile. Converts Sand tiles to Smoke afterwards.

effects.name: Seismic Activity
effects.effect: Tile becomes a Chasm at start of enemy turn. Removes emerging.

effects.name: Tentacles
effects.effect: Unit on tile dies, tile turns into Lava. Removes emerging.

effects.name: Volcanic Projectile
effects.effect: Fireball strikes tile, destroying anything present. Sets tile on Fire.

categories.common: Can spawn on any island. Most spawns per mission. Soft spawn limit (can be bypassed).
categories.rare: Unique attacks, do not appear on early islands. Hard spawn limit.
categories.psions: Provide passive bonuses to all other Vek. Only 1 per mission. Do not benefit from their own passive. Flying, 2 HP, 2 move.
categories.minor: Spawned by other Vek (Spiderlings, Blobs). Very weak. Bypass spawning algorithm. Not worth XP. Not affected by Psion bonuses.
categories.leaders: Boss Vek. Found in island HQ missions, Volcanic Hive, and 4th island regular missions (Unfair). Immune to water (Massive trait). Can be killed by Chasms.

ai_behavior: Vek telegraph attacks at start of player turn, targeting buildings, mechs, or objectives
Vek that are not already burning will not deliberately stand on Fire Tiles
Vek do not factor A.C.I.D. Pools when choosing movement paths
Unfrozen Vek skip their first turn (do not ready an attack until next turn)
Alpha Vek are upgraded versions with higher HP and stronger attacks

alpha_vek_scaling.easy: No alphas outside 3-objective missions on islands 1-2
alpha_vek_scaling.normal: Alphas appear outside 3-objective missions from island 2
alpha_vek_scaling.hard: Alphas appear more often, from island 1

vek_behavior.massive_trait: All player Mechs and boss Vek have Massive trait - survive in water/lava (but cannot attack while submerged). Can still be killed by Chasms.

islands.missions_per_island: Complete 4 out of 7 available missions, then fight HQ boss
islands.island_order: Player chooses order. Difficulty scales with number of completed islands.

island_corporations.archive_inc: Museum Island - recreates Old Earth environments
island_corporations.rst_corporation: Desert Island - terraforming specialists, unique RST environments
island_corporations.pinnacle_robotics: Ice Island - fights Vek and rogue Sentient Weapons
island_corporations.detritus_disposal: Factory Island - waste removal, conveyor belts, A.C.I.D.

objective_tiers.1_objective: Defensive shields placed on random buildings. Only one objective (1 power or reputation).
objective_tiers.2_objectives: No modifier. Two objectives (each gives 1 power, reputation, or reactor core), or one objective giving 2.
objective_tiers.3_objectives: High-threat: at least one alpha Vek and increased spawns. Up to 3 objectives totaling 3 rewards. Usually includes a Reactor Core building.

perfect_island.condition: Complete all 4 missions with all bonus objectives fulfilled (including time pods) and no sectors lost.
perfect_island.reward: Choice between: new item, pilot, or +2 Grid Power.

volcanic_hive.access: Available after completing 2 islands (minimum required to attempt final mission).
volcanic_hive.phase_1_surface: 5 turns on volcanic surface. Super Volcano creates environmental hazards. Power Pylons deployed. Ends with seismic activity.
volcanic_hive.phase_2_underground: Deploy in 2x2 formation with Renfield Bomb. Fight boss Vek and spawns. No buildings. Disabled mechs from phase 1 are restored.
volcanic_hive.psion: Psion Tyrant always spawns (deals 1 damage to all player units per turn).
